result.stdout:
Usage:  [options] <executable>

Arguments:
  executable               The single file executable to be extracted

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.
  -o|--output <DIRECTORY>  (optional) The directory to write the extracted files
                           to. Omit this option to only list the files.
